katas.title: Prioritize a Feature Backlog
katas.prompt: You have 5 feature requests: (A) Dark mode (100 upvotes), (B) Export to CSV (50 upvotes, 3 enterprise clients blocked), (C) Mobile app (200 upvotes), (D) Performance improvement (10 upvotes, but page load is 8 seconds), (E) Social login (80 upvotes). Your team can do 2 features this quarter. Prioritize and explain.
criteria: Does not just sort by upvotes
Explains trade-offs for items not selected
Uses a prioritization framework or clear reasoning
